transcript:
Speaker A (AI): मैं train पर bore हो रहा हूँ [I am getting bored on the train] 
Speaker B (Man): I am getting bored on the train. 
Speaker A (AI): train पर खाना अच्छा नहीं है [The food on the train is not good] 
Speaker B (Man): The food on the train is not good. 
Speaker A (AI): मैं अगले stop पर बाहर से खाना ले लूँगा [I will get food from outside on the next stop] 
Speaker B (Man): I will get food from outside on the next stop. 
Speaker A (AI): Very good. तुम्हारी English तो बहुत अच्छी है [Very good. Your English is very good] 
Speaker B (Man): Thank you. 
Speaker A (AI): तुमने English बोलना कहाँ से सीखा? [Where did you learn to speak English?] 
Speaker B (Man): वो मैंने MySivi app से सीखा [I learned that from MySivi app] 
Speaker A (AI): MySivi app? 
Speaker B (Man): Yes. MySivi app पे ना सिर्फ English बोलना सिखाया जाता है बल्कि... MySivi पे इतने अच्छे से सिखाते हैं कि English सीखना बच्चों का खेल लगता है [Yes. On MySivi app, not only is English speaking taught, but... they teach so well on MySivi that learning English feels like child's play] 
Speaker A (AI): Nice. ये फिर हमारे सारे लोगों को use करना चाहिए [Nice. Then all our people should use this] 
Speaker B (Man): हाँ वैसे भी आजकल सारे लोग Instagram पे बहुत time waste करते हैं [Yes, anyway nowadays everyone wastes a lot of time on Instagram] 
Speaker A (AI): हम्म [Hmm] 
Speaker B (Man): पर मैं नहीं करता [But I don't] 
Speaker B (Man): मैं तो वो time MySivi app को देता हूँ [I give that time to MySivi app] 
Speaker B (Man): And my English is getting better and better everyday. 
Speaker A (AI): Fantastic. फिर तो सारे लोगों को MySivi app download कर लेनी चाहिए [Fantastic. Then everyone should download MySivi app] 
Speaker C (Voiceover): Install Now पे click करो और MySivi app download करो [Click on Install Now and download MySivi app]
on_screen_text:
ARYA AI is speaking...
मैं train पर bore हो रहा हूँ / I am getting bored on the train
train पर खाना अच्छा नहीं है / The food on the train is not good
मैं अगले stop पर बाहर से खाना ले लूँगा / I will get food from outside on the next stop
to bahut acchi
bolna kahan se
MySivi App
MySivi app pe
bolna sikhaya
seekhna bachhon
saare logon ko
pe bahut timewaste
main to wo time
and my English
is getting better
and better everyday
to sare logon
ko MySivi app
leni chahiye
MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A young man on a train practices English by translating Hindi sentences spoken by an AI avatar on his phone. He credits his improved English skills to the MySivi app, which he uses instead of wasting time on social media. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the MySivi app.
